subcodes.first_line: O esteemed souls! Yesterday letters were received from Tamaddunu'l-Mulk concerning the London Congress, for your information [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس محترمه از تمدن الملک مکاتیب دیروز در خصوص کنگره لندن رسید محض اطلاع
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
